parameters.query:
INSERT INTO chat_sessions (session_id, original_query, questions_asked, answers_collected, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid()::TEXT,
  '{{ $('Parse Input').item.json.user_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '[]'::jsonb,
  '[]'::jsonb,
  'questioning',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING session_id, original_query, questions_asked, answers_collected, status;

SELECT session_id, original_query, questions_asked, answers_collected, status
FROM chat_sessions
WHERE session_id = '{{ $('Parse Input').item.json.session_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO session_messages (session_id, role, content, turn_number, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Merge Session Data').item.json.session_id }}',
  'user',
  '{{ $('Parse Input').item.json.user_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  jsonb_array_length('{{ JSON.stringify($('Merge Session Data').item.json.answers_collected).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) + 1,
  NOW()
);

UPDATE chat_sessions
SET 
  questions_asked = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.updatedQuestions).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  answers_collected = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.updatedAnswers).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  status = CASE 
    WHEN {{ $json.questionsCount }} >= 3 THEN 'searching'
    ELSE 'questioning'
  END
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}';

INSERT INTO session_messages (session_id, role, content, turn_number, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  'bot',
  '{{ $json.questionText.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.questionsCount }},
  NOW()
);
UPDATE chat_sessions SET status = 'searching' WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}';

SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.name,
  d.specialization,
  d.experience_years,
  d.location,
  d.languages,
  d.availability,
  d.rating,
  d.fee_range,
  d.bio,
  d.phone,
  d.email,
  d.hospital_name,
  d.profile_image_url,
  CASE WHEN d.embedding IS NOT NULL THEN 1 - (d.embedding <=> '{{ $json.embeddingStr }}'::vector) ELSE 0.5 END AS similarity_score
FROM doctors d
ORDER BY CASE WHEN d.embedding IS NOT NULL THEN d.embedding <=> '{{ $json.embeddingStr }}'::vector ELSE 1.0 END
LIMIT 5;

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{ [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a medical assistant that helps patients find the best doctor. Analyze the patient's needs and the available doctors, then select the BEST matching doctor. Return ONLY a valid JSON object with no extra text, no markdown, no explanation. The JSON must have these exact keys: best_match_index (0-based integer), match_reason (string, max 100 words), confidence_score (float 0-1), key_strengths (array of 3 strings), recommendation_note (string, 1 sentence patient-friendly message), report_summary (string, a short 2-3 sentence summary summarizing the patient's medical report/history if provided in the context, otherwise empty string)." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Patient Context:
" + $json.fullContext + "

Available Doctors:
" + $json.doctorsText + "

Select the best doctor and return the JSON." } ] }}
